positive: A stylized, abstract celestial body illustration. The main subject is a majestic, bioluminescent crescent moon partially obscuring a vibrant nebula. The nebula features swirling gradients of deep indigo, emerald green, and electric cyan. Accompanying the moon are scattered constellations formed by delicate, glowing geometric lines and small, stylized five-pointed stars. Composition is centralized and perfectly balanced, designed as a repeating print motif. The art style is modern linework meets vaporwave minimalism, with clean silhouettes and high contrast. Lighting is ethereal and source-based, emphasizing the glow and depth. The overall aesthetic is clean, suitable for apparel printing, with sharp edges and perfect symmetry.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, blur, blurry, grainy, noisy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, malformed, low resolution, out of focus, jpeg artifacts
